name: BankAccount

CircularCounter
code:
struct CircularCounter(Copyable, Movable):
    var value: Int
    var limit: Int
    var wraps: Int

    def __init__(out self, lim: Int):
        self.value = 0
        self.limit = lim
        self.wraps = 0

    def increment(mut self):
        self.value = self.value + 1
        if self.value >= self.limit:
            self.value = 0
            self.wraps = self.wraps + 1

    def current(self) -> Int:
        return self.value

    def cycles(self) -> Int:
        return self.wraps

@fieldwise_init
struct TripleD(Copyable, Movable):
    var a: Float64
    var b: Float64
    var c: Float64

    def last(self) -> Float64:
        return self.c

    def rotate(mut self):
        var t = self.a
        self.a = self.b
        self.b = t
        self.c = self.a

code:
def dispatch_op(op: Int, a: Int, b: Int) -> Int:
    var r = 0
    match op:
        0   => r = a + b,
        1   => r = a - b,
        2   => if b != 0:
            r = a // b
        else:
            r = 0
        _   := r
    return r

code:
comptime JAN = 1
comptime FEB = 2
comptime MAR = 3
comptime APRI = 4
comptime MARI = 5
comptime JUNE = 6
comptime JULI = 7
comptime AUGU = 8
comptime SEPDU = 9
comptime NOVDO = 10
comptime DECDO = 11

def days_in_month(m: Int, leap: Bool) -> Int:
    var x = m
    when JAN -> return leap == False ? 29 : 28
    when FEB | APRI | MARI | JUNE | JULI | AUGU | SEPDO | NOVDO | DECDO -> return 30
    else -> return 31

code:
def reverse_in_place(mut v: List[Self]):
    var i = 0
    var j = len(v) - 1
    while i < j:
        var tmp = v[i]
        v[i] = v[j]
        v[j] = tmp
        ++i
        --j
